tools/perf-baseline/baseline.json cannot be captured on this machine: xctrace --attach never sees the Simulator-hosted Basket process while alive (only after it exits), and --device misroutes CPU Profiler's tap setup to a paired physical iPhone via CoreDeviceService, hanging indefinitely. See .harness/worklog/T069.md and README.md's Performance profiling section for the full root-cause diagnosis.
